notes:
PASS. All CRITICAL and HIGH checks clean.

--- CRITICAL checks ---

SCOPE (PASS): Worker touched only src/renderer/game/data/regions.js. The git diff --stat shows other files modified in the working tree; those belong to prior agents already committed — the per-file diff for regions.js is +53/-9 and isolated to that file only.

BIOME ENUM (PASS): Exact match to spec — Object.freeze, all 7 keys (DESERT, GRASSLAND, WATER, ROCK, MOUNTAIN, URBAN, UNKNOWN), lowercase string values, exported as `const BIOME`. No deviation.

VALUE NORMALIZATION vs ADDITIVE SPEC (PASS — judgment call confirmed): The spec said 'add a biome field per region' but every region already had a `biome:` field with non-canonical strings. Worker replaced the values in-place with BIOME enum references. Independent grep confirms no consumer reads `region.biome` from region data: all `.biome` references outside regions.js are runtime state paths (state.environment.biome in MCPSystem.js, aiPromptBuilders.js, questGenerator.js, gameAI.js, physicsbridge.js) and a structurally unrelated ecology.js spread. Zero behavioral risk. Normalizing in-place rather than adding a parallel field is the correct call — a parallel field would have created confusion and potential drift. The spirit of the spec ('consumers reading REGIONS[id].name etc. still work') is fully satisfied.

GETBIOME SIGNATURE (PASS with note): Spec example shows `REGIONS[regionId]?.biome` — but REGIONS is an array, not a map, so that would always return undefined. Worker correctly used `REGION_MAP[regionId]?.biome`, which is keyed by region id. The spec example has a latent bug; the worker's implementation is correct and verified. Returns BIOME.UNKNOWN on missing id via the `|| BIOME.UNKNOWN` fallback.

EXISTING EXPORTS (PASS): All five pre-existing exports confirmed present — `default` (REGIONS array), `REGION_MAP`, `getRegionMaterial`, `getAllMineableMaterials`, `RARITY_CHANCE`.

--- HIGH checks ---

RECEIPT ACCURACY (PASS): files_changed lists only regions.js — correct. exports_added lists BIOME and getBiome — both confirmed exported. Region count (9) matches the diff. Biome assignment list in notes matches the diff exactly.

--- MEDIUM observations (non-blocking) ---

STALE FALLBACK STRING (MEDIUM, non-blocking): src/renderer/game/systems/ai/questGenerator.js line 210 contains `const biome = context.biome || 'desert_scrub';`. The string 'desert_scrub' is now a non-canonical value (enum uses 'desert'). Not introduced by this worker; not a regression. Follow-up should update questGenerator.js to use the BIOME enum import.

MCPSystem FALLBACK STRING (MEDIUM, non-blocking): MCPSystem.js line 221 sets `this.state.environment.biome = env.biomeType || 'desert_scrub';`. Same stale non-canonical string in runtime state. Not touched by this worker; flagged for follow-up.

--- LOW ---

ARCHITECTURAL FIT (PASS): BIOME enum placed at top of file with clear section comment. getBiome appended at bottom after existing helpers. Style matches existing exports. JavaScript only, no new dependencies introduced.
